resume_markdown:
# Naresh Bhukya
Senior Java & Full-Stack Developer | Spring Boot Microservices | AI Agent Integration

Phone: | Email: | LinkedIn: | Location: | GitHub:

## Professional Summary
Results-driven software professional with over 9 years of experience in designing, developing, and deploying robust enterprise applications. Core expertise lies in Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices architecture for scalable backend systems. Proven full-stack capabilities with Angular and React.js for dynamic frontends. Currently pioneering the integration of Agentic AI and automation frameworks (CrewAI) to enhance application intelligence and workflow efficiency. Seeking a Java Developer role to leverage deep backend proficiency and innovative AI experience to build high-performance solutions.

## Core Technical Skills
*   **Backend & APIs:** Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, REST APIs, Python
*   **Frontend:** Angular, React.js, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/TypeScript
*   **AI & Automation:** Agentic AI, CrewAI, AI Agent Development, Workflow Automation
*   **Development & Tools:** Full-Stack Development, Git, Docker, SQL/NoSQL Databases, Agile/Scrum
*   **Paradigms:** Object-Oriented Design (OOD), Test-Driven Development (TDD), CI/CD

## Professional Experience
**Full Stack Developer**
*Company Name, City, State*
*Dates of Employment*
*   Engineered and maintained 10+ core microservices using Java and Spring Boot, improving system throughput by 40% and reducing latency.
*   Developed full-stack features by building RESTful APIs (Spring Boot) and integrating with responsive front-end components (Angular), reducing feature deployment time by 25%.
*   Pioneered the integration of Agentic AI workflows using CrewAI to automate complex data processing and report generation, eliminating 15+ hours of manual work per week.
*   Collaborated in an Agile team to design, develop, and deploy scalable software solutions, ensuring high code quality through TDD and CI/CD practices.

## Technical Projects
**AI-Powered Document Processing Agent** | *[CrewAI, Python, FastAPI, React]*
*An autonomous agent system designed to extract, classify, and summarize information from unstructured documents.*
*   Architected and developed a multi-agent crew using CrewAI framework, where specialized agents handled extraction, validation, and summarization tasks.
*   Integrated the AI agent layer with a Spring Boot backend service to queue documents and store processed results.
*   Built a lightweight React dashboard to monitor agent tasks and review outputs, improving process visibility by 100%.

**Full-Stack E-Commerce Microservices Platform** | *[Java, Spring Boot, React.js, Docker]*
*A scalable platform demonstrating end-to-end development with a microservices architecture.*
*   Designed and implemented 5+ independent microservices for user management, product catalog, and order processing using Spring Boot.
*   Developed a responsive and interactive admin dashboard with React.js to manage platform data and analytics.
*   Containerized services using Docker and established CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.

## Education
**Bachelor of Technology (B-Tech)**
*Institution Name*
*Location* | *Graduation Year*
